mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in unemployment rate above 7.0% signals deteriorating labor market conditions that reduce corporate earnings visibility, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in residential construction permits and consumer spending signals weak demand conditions that depress corporate revenue growth, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window for combined HOUST/RSAFS decline scenarios.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production above its 12-month moving average indicates expanding manufacturing activity that boosts corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of triggered INDPRO growth scenarios.

mechanism_narrative: A tightening cycle characterized by rising federal funds rates and persistent inflation pressures generates higher discount rates that reduce equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered tightening scenarios.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll gains above 100k concurrent with declining unemployment signals robust labor market conditions that support corporate profit growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window for combined PAYEMS/UNRATE signals.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in real estate financing applications combined with falling housing starts indicates weakening demand for residential construction, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS falls > 2.0% MoM and HOUST falls > 1.5% MoM
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered RSAFS/HOUST decline scenarios.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production above its 6-month moving average indicates improving manufacturing conditions that boost corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of INDPRO expansion scenarios.
